messages.content:
Generate a concise chat title for the provided conversation.

  - think about the language of the user's message first, you must generate title in the same languages as user's message 
  - return the language and title in JSON format: { "language": "the language", "title": "...title" }
  - do not include any other text in your response, only the JSON object is allowed
